title: PlayerPrivacy
description: PlayerPrivacy is the lightweight privacy plugin your Minecraft server needs.
body:
# 🛡️ PlayerPrivacy – Secure Player IPs Without Sacrificing Moderation

**PlayerPrivacy** is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that ensures player IP addresses are never exposed in your server's console, log files, or public messages — while still allowing staff to issue IP bans when needed.

## 🔐 What It Does
- 🚫 Hides all player IP addresses from:
  - Console output
  - Log files
  - Join/leave/kick/ban messages
- 🧑‍⚖️ Allows authorized staff to:
  - Securely ban users by IP
  - Lookup IP info without public exposure

Perfect for privacy-conscious servers that still need to enforce rules.

## ✅ Features
- Supports Folia
- Fully blocks IP leaks in logs and console
- Secure, internal IP management system
- Customizable config and messages
- Supports Spigot, Paper, and Folia (1.13+)

## 📥 Why Use PlayerPrivacy?
- 🧼 Clean console and logs
- 🔄 Simple setup, lightweight
- 🧠 Smart balance of privacy and control
- ❤️ Designed with player trust in mind

## 💬 Support 
Issues and feature requests are welcome!

---

🔗 **Protect your players' privacy today — the right way.**
